description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit with four open shelves, each evenly spaced and supported by solid side panels. The structure is simple and functional, with no visible doors, handles, or decorative elements. The shelves are flat and appear sturdy, suitable for holding books, supplies, or other items commonly found in urban environments such as offices, garages, or public spaces. The back panel is solid, providing additional support and stability to the unit. The overall finish is smooth and uniform, with a neutral color that blends easily into various settings. The design is utilitarian, prioritizing storage and accessibility over ornamentation.
description: A tall, open shelving unit with four sturdy shelves and a smooth, neutral finish. Its simple, functional design is ideal for urban storage needs.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves and a solid back panel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves and the flat, solid side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, showing the flat side panel.
